description:
A crude iron axe with a nicked edge and a leather-wrapped handle. Ugly, heavy, but 
suprisingly effective.
name: Goblin Chopper

description: A light, brutal axe favored by road bandits. Slightly raises AGI.
name: Raider's Hatchet

description: A heavy axe with a chipped wedge-shaped head. May inflict Frailty.
name: Stonecleaver

description: An axe edged with hooked razorbeak talons. May inflict Frailty.
name: Taloncleaver Axe
note:
<SL Shop Cost>
Sharp Beak: 4
Razorbeak Talon: 2
</SL Shop Cost>

<ATK: +37>

description: A dependable iron blade with balanced weight. A basic knight’s weapon.
name: Iron Longsword

description: A knightly sword carried by sworn defenders. Slightly raises guard.
name: Oathkeeper Blade

description: A knightly blade set with forest dragon scale. Improves guarding.
name: Wyrmscale Defender
note:
<SL Shop Cost>
Dragon Scale: 2
Forest Dragon Fang: 1
Razorbeak Talon: 1
</SL Shop Cost>

<ATK: +22>
<DEF: +5>
<MDF: +5>

description:
A heat-darkened spear left behind by the Demon Knight. Its balance makes leaping attacks feel 
strangely natural.
name: Ashen Dragoon Spear

description: A short goblin bow made from scavenged wood, bone pins, and mismatched sinew.
name: Scrapwood Shortbow

description: A reliable bow carved from seasoned yew. Slightly improves accuracy.
name: Hunter's Yew Bow

description: A flexible bow built for quick draws. Raises AGI and critical chance.
name: Falcon Bow

description: A light bow strung with razorwing fiber. Raises accuracy and agility.
name: Razorwing Recurve
note:
<AGI: +3>
<ATK: +23>

<SL Shop Cost>
Razorwing Feather: 3
Sharp Beak: 3
Razorbeak Talon: 1
</SL Shop Cost>

description: A crooked staff decorated with beads, feathers, and cracked monster bones. Still carries a trace of stolen healing magic.
name: Shaman's Crook

description: A simple staff carried by traveling clerics. Slightly raises maximum MP.
name: Pilgrim's Staff

description: A healer’s staff wrapped in white thread. Improves healing magic.
name: Staff of Mending

description: A healer's staff reinforced with dragon scale. Improves healing magic.
name: Verdant Mercy Staff
note:
<MAT: +31>
<SL Healing Done: 1.12>
<SL State Resist: Poison, 75%>

<SL Shop Cost>
Dragon Scale: 1
Razorwing Feather: 2
Venom Sac: 2
</SL Shop Cost>

description: A blackened branch carved with messy goblin glyphs. It sparks when pointed at something unlucky.
name: Hex-Twig Wand

description: A warm black wand with a faint ember glow. Suited for fire magic.
name: Charcoal Wand

description: A soot-dark wand that channels raw spell power. Raises magic attack.
name: Ashen Wand

description: A dark wand tipped with a toxic talon. Spells may inflict Poison.
name: Venomthorn Wand
note:
<MAT: +51>
<SL Magic Add State: Poison, 10%>

<SL Shop Cost>
Venom Sac: 4
Toxic Talon: 2
Sharp Beak: 2
</SL Shop Cost>
